description: Steps Tracker MVP — A beautiful dark-theme GitHub Pages site for tracking daily 20,000-step goal via checkmarks. Built with Bun, Next.js, shadcn/ui, Vitest.

userStories.title: Install APM and agent skills
userStories.description: As a developer, I need APM installed with the relevant awesome-copilot skills so the agent has reference knowledge during development.
acceptanceCriteria: APM is installed (curl -sSL https://aka.ms/apm-unix | sh)
apm.yml is created with 6 skills: premium-frontend-ui, publish-to-pages, conventional-commit, gh-cli, create-readme, web-design-reviewer
apm install runs successfully
userStories.notes: APM was already installed at /opt/homebrew/bin/apm. All 6 skills installed and integrated to .github/skills/

userStories.title: Create repo and scaffold Next.js project
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a public GitHub repo with Next.js + Bun + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Vitest configured for static export.
acceptanceCriteria: Public repo ragmha/tracker-steps created on GitHub
Next.js project initialized with Bun, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint
next.config.ts configured for static export (output: 'export')
shadcn/ui initialized with dark theme default
Vitest + @testing-library/react + jsdom installed and configured
package.json has scripts: lint, typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run), build
data/steps.json created with goal: 20000 and empty entries array
bun run lint passes
bun run typecheck passes
bun run build passes
userStories.notes: Repo created, scaffolded, all quality gates pass.

userStories.title: Build data layer with types and utility functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need typed data utilities that read steps.json at build time and compute today's status, weekly entries, streak, and completion.
acceptanceCriteria: src/types/index.ts has StepEntry, StepsData, WeeklyCompletion interfaces
src/lib/steps.ts exports: getStepsData(), getTodayStatus(), getWeeklyEntries(), getStreak(), getWeeklyCompletion()
getStepsData() reads data/steps.json at build time via fs.readFileSync
getStreak() counts consecutive completed days from most recent
getWeeklyCompletion() returns {completed, total, percentage}
src/lib/__tests__/steps.test.ts has comprehensive unit tests for all functions
bun run test passes
bun run typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Data layer committed. 5 functions, 3 interfaces, 24 passing tests.

userStories.title: Build dashboard UI components
userStories.description: As a user, I want a beautiful dark-theme dashboard with TodayCard, WeeklyView, StreakCounter, and GoalCard using shadcn/ui.
acceptanceCriteria: shadcn/ui Card, Badge, Progress, Separator components are installed
TodayCard shows bold step count '0 / 20,000' with Progress bar and status Badge
WeeklyView shows 7-day grid (Mon-Sun) with checkmarks and mini vertical bars
StreakCounter shows fire emoji + streak count in a Card
GoalCard shows target emoji + '20,000 steps' goal display
All components use dark theme styling inspired by Dribbble reference
Green-to-yellow gradient on progress bars
Component tests exist in src/components/__tests__/
bun run test passes
bun run typecheck passes
userStories.notes: 4 components with dark theme, gradient progress bars, 13 component tests passing.

userStories.title: Assemble main dashboard page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a single responsive page combining all dashboard components with dark theme.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/page.tsx assembles TodayCard, WeeklyView, StreakCounter, GoalCard
src/app/layout.tsx sets dark theme, Inter font, proper metadata
src/app/globals.css has dark theme base styles
Page reads step data at build time via data utils
Responsive layout works on mobile and desktop
Header shows 'Steps Tracker' title and today's date
bun run lint passes
bun run typecheck passes
bun run build passes (static export generates out/ directory)
userStories.notes: Main page assembled. All 4 quality gates pass. Responsive dark-theme dashboard.

userStories.title: Add GitHub Pages deployment workflow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a GitHub Actions workflow to auto-deploy the static site to GitHub Pages on push to main.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/deploy.yml created
Triggers on push to main branch
Uses Bun for install and build
Deploys out/ directory to GitHub Pages
Workflow YAML is valid
bun run lint passes
bun run typecheck passes
bun run test passes
bun run build passes
userStories.notes: Deploy workflow created and committed. Uses Bun + actions/deploy-pages@v4.

userStories.title: Push to main and create PR for initial data entry
userStories.description: As a user, I want a PR that adds my first step entry to establish the edit-JSON-via-PR workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: All code pushed to main branch of ragmha/tracker-steps
Branch add-first-entry created from main
data/steps.json updated with first entry: { date: '2026-04-20', completed: false }
PR opened from add-first-entry to main
README.md includes project description, usage instructions, and privacy statement
userStories.notes: Pushed to main, README added, PR #1 opened at https://github.com/ragmha/tracker-steps/pull/1
